name: control mapping with legal_review_status pending triggers a warning when /audit-pack runs over the controls file
command:
mkdir -p compliance && printf -- '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
' > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --controls compliance/controls.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'warning' out.txt && grep -q 'CC8.1' out.txt && grep -q 'legal_review_status=pending' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
